---
name: Refactor
about: Propose an internal restructuring with no behavior change
title: ''
labels: refactor, triage
assignees: ''
---

## What changes

What is being restructured. File paths, modules, or subsystems.

## Why

The motivating problem — duplication, awkward seam, hard-to-extend pattern. What does the current shape make difficult?

## Proposed shape

The end state. Diagram or sketch if useful.

## Risk

What could break. Are there tests that would catch regressions, or do tests need to be added first?

## Out of scope

Anything adjacent that *won't* be touched in this work.
